narrative:
Milford City has 4,844 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.8 percentage points.
